news.title: Datadog Inc.’s (DDOG) Strong Q4 Reinforces AI Observability Position Amid Competition
news.summary: Datadog Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) is among the best machine learning stocks to buy according to analysts. The company reported strong Q4 2025 results on February 10, with revenue surging 29% year-over-year to $953 million, ahead of the company’s own guidance of $912-916 million. Q4 EPS came in at $0.59, which was ahead of the consensus of […]

news.title: Datadog’s (DDOG) Cautious Outlook Doesn’t Shake Rosenblatt’s Bullish View
news.summary: Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) is one of the 10 Trending AI Stocks According to Analysts. Despite guidance striking a cautious stone for Datadog, Rosenblatt sees robust execution and AI tailwinds for the cyber security company. On February 9, firm analyst Blair Abernethy reiterated a Buy rating and $185.00 price target. Strong Q4 beat, AI-native customer momentum, […]

news.title: DDOG Q4 Deep Dive: AI Adoption and Platform Expansion Drive Robust Growth
news.summary: Cloud monitoring platform Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 29.2% year on year to $953.2 million. Guidance for next quarter’s revenue was optimistic at $956 million at the midpoint, 2.3% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.59 per share was 6.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: 3 Reasons to Stay Away From Datadog Stock Despite Q4 Earnings Beat
news.summary: Datadog's Q4 beat dazzles, but slowing 2026 growth, rising costs, and a premium valuation raise red flags for investors eyeing DDOG.

news.title: Why Datadog (DDOG) Is Up 8.4% After Strong Q4 2025 Earnings And 2026 Revenue Guidance
news.summary: Datadog reported its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results on 10 February 2026, with Q4 revenue rising to US$953.19 million and full-year revenue to US$3.43 billion, while net income increased modestly in Q4 but fell to US$107.74 million for the year. The company paired this with guidance calling for first-quarter 2026 revenue of US$951 million–US$961 million and full-year 2026 revenue of US$4.06 billion–US$4.10 billion, reinforcing the importance of its expanding observability and AI...

news.title: Datadog Inc. (DDOG) Climbs 13.7% on Earnings Blowout
news.summary: We recently published 10 Stocks Delivering Massive Returns. Datadog Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) was one of the best performers on Tuesday. Datadog rallied for a third straight day on Tuesday, jumping 13.74 percent to close at $129.67 apiece after posting a strong revenue performance in both the full-year and fourth quarter of 2025. news.title: Datadog Q4 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates, Both Increase Y/Y
news.summary: DDOG posts Q4 earnings and revenue beat, with customer growth, strong ARR gains and rising cash flow despite margin.

news.title: Datadog: AI Isn't The Main Problem
news.summary: DDOG is integrating AI into its platform, positioning itself to benefit from monitoring and securing AI-driven environments. Read why DDOG stock is a Hold.

news.title: Macquarie Maintains Outperform on Datadog, Lowers Price Target to $200
news.summary: Macquarie  analyst Steve Koenig   maintains Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $220 to $200.

news.title: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Datadog, Raises Price Target to $161
news.summary: RBC Capital  analyst Matthew Hedberg   maintains Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $150 to $161.
